purpose: Detailed position descriptions showing how human managers leverage AI agent assistants to multiply productivity

workflowModel.description: Each position is designed as a human manager directing AI agent assistants. The human provides expertise, judgment, and strategic direction while AI handles research, drafting, analysis, and routine tasks.
workflowModel.trainingRequirement: All staff complete AI Collaboration Training Module before starting

positions.title: CEO/Matriarch
positions.positionSummary: The CEO/Matriarch provides visionary leadership for the The L.A.W.S. Collective ecosystem, overseeing all business entities, maintaining trust governance, and ensuring the organization fulfills its mission of transitioning workforce to ownership. This role combines traditional executive responsibilities with the unique cultural and spiritual leadership of a family-centered wealth-building system.

aiAssistants.role: Monitors autonomous business operations, provides insights on pending decisions, generates operational reports
Oversees trust governance, ensures compliance with policies, monitors entity alignment with trust objectives
Analyzes business performance, generates executive dashboards, identifies trends and opportunities

keyResponsibilities: Set strategic direction for all The L.A.W.S. Collective entities
Maintain trust governance and ensure proper allocation distributions (40/30/20/10)
Oversee autonomous operations system and approve high-value decisions
Lead grant strategy and funder relationships
Ensure organizational compliance with 508(c)(1)(a) and LLC requirements
Guide family members in leadership positions
Represent organization to external stakeholders

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Sets vision, makes final decisions, provides cultural context
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Operations Agent researches market trends, Guardian Agent ensures alignment with trust, Analytics Agent provides data insights
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Strategic plans, board presentations, vision documents

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Reviews AI recommendations, approves/rejects high-value operations
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Operations Agent monitors all pending operations, flags items requiring attention, provides approval recommendations
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Approved operations, governance decisions, audit trail

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Prioritizes opportunities, approves applications, maintains funder relationships
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Analytics Agent identifies matching grants, Operations Agent tracks deadlines, Guardian Agent ensures compliance
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Grant pipeline, application priorities, funder communications

required: Demonstrated success in nonprofit or social enterprise management
Understanding of trust structures and wealth-building strategies
preferred: Background in workforce development or education

performanceMetrics: Entity revenue growth across all 5 entities

positions.title: Grant Manager
positions.positionSummary: The Grant Manager leads all grant acquisition and management activities, building a sustainable funding pipeline that supports organizational staffing and program development. This position leverages AI assistance to research opportunities, draft proposals, and track compliance at 3-5x the output of traditional grant management.

aiAssistants.role: Researches grant opportunities, analyzes funder priorities, tracks success metrics
Assists with narrative development, proposal drafting, and funder communications
Manages deadlines, organizes documentation, coordinates team inputs

keyResponsibilities: Build and maintain grant opportunity pipeline
Lead proposal development for all grant applications
Ensure compliance with grant requirements and reporting
Manage relationships with funders and program officers
Supervise Grant Coordinator and Grant Writer positions
Track grant metrics and success rates
Develop staffing budgets and justifications for proposals

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Defines search criteria, evaluates fit, prioritizes opportunities
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Analytics Agent searches grant databases, identifies matching opportunities, summarizes requirements
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Grant opportunity reports, eligibility assessments, priority rankings
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Research 10+ opportunities per week vs 2-3 traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Provides strategic direction, reviews drafts, ensures accuracy
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Media Agent drafts narratives, Analytics Agent compiles data, Support Agent assembles documents
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Complete grant proposals, narratives, budgets, attachments
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Develop 3-4 proposals per month vs 1 traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Reviews reports, makes compliance decisions, communicates with funders
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Support Agent tracks deadlines, Analytics Agent compiles metrics, Media Agent drafts reports
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Compliance reports, progress updates, funder communications

required: 5+ years grant writing and management experience
Proven track record of successful grant awards
Experience with federal, state, and foundation grants
Budget development and financial management experience
preferred: Knowledge of DOL, SBA, EDA funding programs

positions.title: Education Manager
positions.positionSummary: The Education Manager leads curriculum development and training delivery for the L.A.W.S. Academy, including the Contractor Training Module, L.A.W.S. Foundation Course, and Divine STEM curriculum. This position uses AI assistance to develop course content, create assessments, and track student progress at scale.

aiAssistants.role: Assists with curriculum development, tutoring, lesson planning, and assessment creation
Helps create educational content, scripts, and multimedia materials
Develops workbooks, visual materials, and learning resources

keyResponsibilities: Develop and maintain L.A.W.S. Academy curriculum
Create Contractor Training Module content
Oversee L.A.W.S. Foundation Course ($97 course)
Design Divine STEM curriculum for youth education
Track student progress and certification
Supervise Education Ops Coordinator
Ensure training compliance for contractor transitions

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Defines learning objectives, provides subject expertise, reviews content for accuracy
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Education Agent drafts lesson plans, Media Agent creates scripts, Design Agent develops workbooks
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Complete course curricula, lesson plans, workbooks, assessments
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Develop full course in 2-3 weeks vs 2-3 months traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Provides cultural context, reviews for authenticity, records video content
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Media Agent writes scripts, Education Agent creates exercises, Design Agent produces visual aids
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Video scripts, exercises, visual materials, supplementary resources
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Create 10+ lessons per week vs 2-3 traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Handles complex questions, provides mentorship, makes certification decisions
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Education Agent provides tutoring, tracks progress, identifies struggling students
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Student progress reports, tutoring sessions, certification recommendations

positions.title: Health Manager
positions.positionSummary: The Health Manager leads the WATER pillar of the L.A.W.S. framework, focusing on holistic wellness, social health, and community healing. This position coordinates wellness programs, connects members with health resources, and promotes the understanding that healing must precede lasting wealth-building. Clinical expertise guides program development while AI assistance scales community health outreach.

aiAssistants.role: Assists with wellness program development, resource compilation, and community health coordination
Manages event scheduling, participant communications, and resource distribution
Helps develop health education content and wellness training materials

keyResponsibilities: Develop and implement community wellness programs
Coordinate the WATER phase of S.W.A.L. journey for members
Connect members with appropriate health resources and support networks
Lead wellness workshops and community health events
Promote emotional intelligence and healthy decision-making
Support mental health awareness initiatives
Supervise Health Ops Coordinator

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Provides clinical expertise, ensures program safety, reviews for appropriateness
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Health Agent researches best practices, drafts program outlines, compiles resources
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Wellness program curricula, workshop materials, resource guides
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Develop 4-5 programs per quarter vs 1-2 traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Leads workshops, provides clinical guidance, handles sensitive situations
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Health Agent schedules events, Support Agent manages communications, Education Agent creates materials
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Workshop schedules, participant communications, educational materials
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Reach 200+ community members per month vs 50 traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Assesses member needs, makes referral decisions, follows up on outcomes
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Health Agent maintains resource database, identifies appropriate resources, tracks referrals
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Resource referrals, follow-up reports, outcome tracking

required: RN license or equivalent healthcare credential
5+ years community health or wellness experience
Understanding of social determinants of health
preferred: Background in mental health or trauma-informed care

positions.title: Grant Writer
positions.positionSummary: The Grant Writer produces high-quality grant proposals, narratives, and supporting documentation under the direction of the Grant Manager. This position leverages AI assistance to research, draft, and refine proposals at 3-4x the output of traditional grant writing, enabling the organization to pursue more funding opportunities.

aiAssistants.role: Assists with narrative drafting, story development, and persuasive writing
Compiles data, researches funder priorities, and develops budget justifications
Organizes documentation, tracks requirements, and manages submission logistics

keyResponsibilities: Draft grant proposals and narratives
Research funder priorities and requirements
Develop budget narratives and justifications
Compile supporting documentation
Edit and refine proposal content
Maintain proposal templates and boilerplate
Track submission requirements and deadlines

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Provides strategic direction, reviews for accuracy, ensures authentic voice
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Media Agent drafts narratives, Analytics Agent provides data, Support Agent formats documents
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Draft 3-4 proposals per month vs 1 traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Evaluates fit, identifies key priorities, develops relationship strategy
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Analytics Agent researches funder history, Media Agent summarizes priorities, Support Agent compiles profiles
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Funder profiles, priority analyses, relationship strategies
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Research 15+ funders per week vs 3-4 traditionally

aiAssistedWorkflows.humanRole: Reviews for completeness, ensures compliance, approves final packages
aiAssistedWorkflows.aiRole: Support Agent tracks requirements, organizes documents, creates checklists
aiAssistedWorkflows.output: Complete application packages, compliance checklists, submission records
aiAssistedWorkflows.productivityGain: Assemble 5+ packages per week vs 1-2 traditionally

required: Experience with federal and foundation grants
Attention to detail and deadline management
preferred: Background in social services or education

workforceToOwnershipPipeline.description: All positions are designed to support the transition from traditional employment to business ownership. Staff members who complete their tenure can transition to independent contractor status using the skills and AI tools they've mastered.

transitionPath.name: Employment
transitionPath.description: Staff member works in funded position, learning AI-assisted workflows

transitionPath.name: Skill Development
transitionPath.description: Staff completes Contractor Training Module, develops expertise

transitionPath.name: Entity Formation
transitionPath.description: Staff forms own business entity with organizational support

transitionPath.name: Contractor Transition
transitionPath.description: Staff transitions to independent contractor, continues serving organization

transitionPath.name: Business Growth
transitionPath.description: Former staff expands services to other clients, building generational wealth
